column3: Non-Storable Content fires because every response sets Cache-Control: no-store — the correct, intentional choice for this app (dynamic /health, /version endpoints; no CDN caching strategy for static assets at this scale). ZAP's baseline ruleset surfaces this informationally even when non-storable is the more secure state, not because it's an actual finding. Making content cacheable to silence this would be a regression, not a fix.
